purpose: Red-team weaker HDFS capacity-pressure anchors that were previously labeled as HDFS_RETRY_ALLOCATION_AFTER_CAPACITY_CHECK without relying on direct allocateBlock selected alerts.

cases.eligibility_note: Weak DataXceiver anchor currently labeled as allocation-pressure in the candidate audit. Probe whether it remains thesis-grade or collapses into pipeline semantics.
